title: Founder Salon in Palo Alto
text: At a softly absurd dinner in Palo Alto, Ada Vector and Milo Kern hosted a salon for founders, angel investors, and one quietly overcaffeinated robotics engineer. People kept name-dropping Nimbus Capital, talking about inference margins, and comparing notes on hacker houses near University Avenue. Someone passed around a memo called zero to one hundred while another guest pitched a compliance copilot for snack subscriptions.
